sections.title: Must Have — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Must Have is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + must have + past participle (strong certainty about the past). Rules: 'Must have' expresses strong logical certainty about something in the past | Formula: must have + V3 (past participle) | Not used for obligation in the past — only certainty/deduction | Same form for all subjects
sections.formula: Subject + must have + past participle (strong certainty about the past)

examples.hindi: उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी।
examples.english: He must have worked very hard.

examples.hindi: वह जरूर थका हुआ होगा।
examples.english: He must have been tired.

examples.hindi: उन्होंने जरूर गलती की होगी।
examples.english: They must have made a mistake.

examples.hindi: उसने जरूर सच बोला होगा।
examples.english: She must have told the truth.

examples.hindi: हमने जरूर देर कर दी होगी।
examples.english: We must have been late.

examples.hindi: उसने जरूर यह किताब पढ़ी होगी।
examples.english: He must have read this book.

sections.title: Must Have — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Must Have for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + must have + past participle (strong certainty about the past)

examples.hindi: वह जरूर बहुत खुश हुई होगी।
examples.english: She must have been very happy.

examples.hindi: उन्होंने जरूर बहुत पैसे खर्च किए होंगे।
examples.english: They must have spent a lot of money.

examples.hindi: उसने जरूर मुझे फोन किया होगा।
examples.english: He must have called me.

examples.hindi: वह जरूर वहाँ गई होगी।
examples.english: She must have gone there.

examples.hindi: हमने जरूर सही रास्ता चुना होगा।
examples.english: We must have chosen the right path.

examples.hindi: उसने जरूर मेहनत से पढ़ाई की होगी।
examples.english: He must have studied hard.

sections.title: Must Have — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Must Have — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Must Have in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + must have + past participle (strong certainty about the past)

examples.hindi: वे जरूर सफल हुए होंगे।
examples.english: They must have succeeded.

examples.hindi: उसने जरूर मुझसे बात की होगी।
examples.english: He must have talked to me.

examples.hindi: वह जरूर उदास हुई होगी।
examples.english: She must have been sad.

examples.hindi: उन्होंने जरूर यह देख लिया होगा।
examples.english: They must have seen this.

sections.title: Must Have — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Must Have — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Must Have. Common mistakes: wrong verb form after the modal, or missing "have" in perfect modals.
sections.formula: Subject + must have + past participle (strong certainty about the past)

examples.hindi: उसने जरूर बहुत सोचा होगा।
examples.english: He must have thought a lot.

examples.hindi: वह जरूर घर पहुंच गई होगी।
examples.english: She must have reached home.

examples.hindi: हमने जरूर सही किया होगा।
examples.english: We must have done it right.

examples.hindi: उसने जरूर वादा तोड़ा होगा।
examples.english: He must have broken the promise.
